narrative:
Buchtel Vlg (precinct in Athens County) has 330 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 14.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 34.8%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 20.6 percentage points.
